message.gracebound.cross_dimension: Grace cannot guide you across dimensions
gracebound.configuration.title: %s Configuration
gracebound.configuration.enableFade.tool: Whether guidance trails fade in and out.
gracebound.configuration.fadeInTicks.too: How many ticks are used to fade guidance in.
gracebound.configuration.fadeOutTicks.to: How many ticks are used to fade guidance out.
gracebound.configuration.beamDensity.too: Controls how many wispy strands are drawn in the guidance stream.
gracebound.configuration.beamOriginOffse: Forward offset from your eyes where the stream anchor is placed.
gracebound.configuration.beamStartDistan: Extra distance from the anchor before rendering begins.
gracebound.configuration.beamVerticalOff: Vertical offset from eye level for the stream origin.
gracebound.configuration.maxBeamDistance: Maximum visual guidance distance in blocks.
gracebound.configuration.showMessages.to: Whether Gracebound shows client-side guidance messages.
gracebound.configuration.showLodestoneGu: Whether lodestone compass guidance is rendered.
gracebound.configuration.showRecoveryCom: Whether recovery compass guidance is rendered.
gracebound.configuration.showRegularComp: Whether regular compass guidance to spawn is rendered.
